name: Moonrock
description: Discord bot integrations for brand campaigns, working with Walmart and H&R Block across a 41k-member community.

projects.name: Walmart Skyward Bot
projects.description: Automated announcement and product posting system for Walmart's Minecraft server, Walmart Skyward. Handled daily scheduled product recommendations, promoting Walmart-highlighted Minecraft marketplace items to a Discord community of over 41,000 members.

projects.name: H&R Block Q&A Bot
projects.description: RAG-based Q&A Discord bot for H&R Block's community, providing automated support through retrieval-augmented generation.
